author: Raghu Nath Sahai, Lala
title: Mahatama Raja Ram Mohan Rai, No. 1
gloss: Pamphlet No. 1 of a series, giving a brief account of the life of Raja Ram Mohan Rai, the great religious reformer of India and the founder of the Brahmo Samaj. He was born in Radhanagar, district Hugli, in 1774.
publisher: Author, Head Master, Sardar Dayal Singh High School

author: Shiw Brit Lal, Babu, M.A.
title: Gosain Tulsi Das ji Maharaj ki Zindagi
gloss: A short sketch of the life of Tulsi Das, the well-known author of the Hindi Ramayana.

author: Shiw Brit Lal, Babu, M.A.
title: Hindu Mataen
gloss: Hindu mothers, containing short biographies of eleven good Hindu women, such as Parvati, Kunti, Bhann Mati, &c., reprinted from the Sadhu Magazine.
notes: Author given as dash (continues serial 27's author).

author: Shiw Brit Lal, Babu, M.A.
title: Sachchi Mataen
gloss: True mothers, containing short biographies of seven good Hindu women, such as Alopi, Dayabai, &c., reprinted from the Sadhu Magazine.

author: Ghulam Muhammad, Mian
title: Taswir-i-Wafa ma'ruf ba Badr wa Khurshid
gloss: A domestic story describing the loves of Badr and Khurshid.

author: Hari Chand, Lala
title: Kath ka Ullu
gloss: The story of a man who pretended to be an alchemist and duped a rich man named Lucas by performing some tricks and thus gained his confidence, but afterwards seizing a favourable opportunity robbed him of all his jewellery and wealth.

author: Muhammad Din, Fauq, Munshi
title: Akbar
gloss: A novel giving an account of the reign of Akbar the Great, the Mughal Emperor of India.
notes: [Previous edition noticed in entry No. 18 at page 26 of the catalogue for the quarter ending the 31st December, 1909.]
